description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly Java, along with Markdown and other languages. The JSON data does not list any public GitHub repos, commits, PRs, or new repos this week.
